task: Configure PCManFM's preferences so the file manager uses list view by default, sorts files by name in ascending order, and shows hidden files. The underlying INI config ~/.config/pcmanfm/default/pcmanfm.conf must have (in the [ui] section): view_mode=list, sort_type=name, sort_order=ascending, show_hidden=1. After changing preferences, create a demo directory /home/user/Documents/preferences_demo/ containing two files: README.md with content 'Preferences configured' and .hidden_note with content 'hidden'. The demo directory must contain exactly 2 entries (counting hidden files).

verification.description: preferences_demo has exactly 2 entries counting hidden
